text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today, and it's time for
Narita Taishin to focus on improving her skills
ahead of the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her social battery is running emptier than usual
since being at camp forces her into closer
quarters with others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to find a quiet spot to help ease her
nerves and allow her to train at her own pace.
